title: PDTF Federation Registry
description: Schema for the PDTF Federation Registry — seed data from which OpenID Federation Entity Statements and Trust Marks are generated.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this registry file.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last registry update.

trustAnchor.description: The federation trust anchor (root of trust).

issuers.description: Map of issuer slug to issuer entry.

userAccountProviders.description: Map of provider slug to user account provider entry.

trustAnchorEntry.description: The OpenID Federation trust anchor that issues subordinate entity statements and trust marks.

entity_identifier.description: HTTPS entity identifier for the trust anchor (used as iss/sub in entity statements).

name.description: Human-readable name of the trust anchor.

trust_mark_issuer.description: Whether this trust anchor issues trust marks.

trust_mark_definitions.description: Map of trust mark ID (URL) to its definition.

trustMarkDefinition.description: A trust mark type defined by the trust anchor.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this trust mark authorises.

issuerEntry.description: A credential issuer or trusted proxy in the PDTF ecosystem.

slug.description: Unique URL-safe identifier for the issuer. Must match the object key.

entity_identifier.description: HTTPS entity identifier used in OpenID Federation (iss/sub in entity statements).

trustLevel.description: Trust level: rootIssuer (primary source), trustedProxy (authorised intermediary), selfAttested (unverified).

status.description: Current operational status of the issuer.

proxyFor.description: Slug of the root issuer this proxy acts on behalf of. Required for trustedProxy entries.

items.description: Entity:path pattern this issuer is authorised to issue credentials for.

authorisedPaths.description: PDTF entity:path patterns this issuer may credential.

items.description: Trust mark ID (URL) this entity holds.

trust_marks.description: Trust mark IDs held by this entity.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from which this issuer entry is valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 timestamp until which this issuer entry is valid.

regulatoryRegistration.description: URL to the issuer's regulatory registration or authority page.

description.description: Optional longer description of the issuer.

userAccountProviderEntry.description: A provider that manages user/organisation accounts and identity verification.

slug.description: Unique URL-safe identifier for the provider. Must match the object key.

entity_identifier.description: HTTPS entity identifier used in OpenID Federation (iss/sub in entity statements).

status.description: Current operational status of the provider.

managedOrganisations.description: Description of how this provider manages organisation identity.

items.description: Trust mark ID (URL) this entity holds.

trust_marks.description: Trust mark IDs held by this entity.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from which this provider entry is valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 timestamp until which this provider entry is valid.

description.description: Optional longer description of the provider.
